title: Day after verdict, rival camps in Cong lobby for Kerala chief minister chair
description: A day after the Congress-led United Democratic Front (UDF) swept the Kerala assembly polls, winning 102 of the state’s 140 seats, camps led by three senior Congress leaders—VD Satheesan, Ramesh Chennithala, and KC Venugopal—began hectic lobbying among newly elected party legislators to stake their claim for the chief minister’s post
